text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head to the gym to think of a new<n>training
regime, when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Grrr... I'm not done yeeeeet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see Twin Turbo shaking violently as<n>she tries to
lift up an extremely heavy<n>barbell.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ab...solutely!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm training to get super-duper swole!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna get strong enough that<n>I can make
everyone eat my dust!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In my last race, the other runners beat<n>me out of
the gate.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's not faaair! I wanna be in the lead<n>from start
to finish!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: If I wanna be first, I've gotta get<n>stronger!
choice_data_list: I think you should prioritize speed, actually.
Yeah, strength is the way to go!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! It's not strength I should<n>focus on?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain that the trick is to overwhelm<n>her
opponents with crushing speed at<n>the start, then
maintain her pace for<n>the rest of the race.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I should overwhelm them with speed<n>at the
start...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. So as long as I keep running,<n>I'll always
be number one!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll hit up the treadmill and work<n>on my
short-burst sprinting!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah! Turbo BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo hastily clambers onto a<n>treadmill, sets
it to max speed, and<n>begins running like a demon.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I knew I was right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
With the soup cream power I have<n>gained, I am
now all-powerful!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Here I go! I'll show everyone justwhat it means to have strength!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah! Power BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo heads toward an even<n>heavier
barbell and begins trying to lift<n>it.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! My arms... They BUUURN!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But I can keep going... I can keep...<n>GOIIING!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I expected, I have to stop Twin<n>Turbo before
she overdoes it and<n>injures her arms.
